cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The question is asking between what times he could have gone, given all these different activities and the fact that the football field was closed after 9pm. First, I need to list out all the times Thomas was doing other things so I can see when he was free. Let me go through each person's sighting: 1. Thomas woke up at 8am. Not sure if that affects anything, but maybe just a starting point. 2. David saw Thomas fixing their computer from 8am to 10am. So from 8 to 10, he's at the electronic store. 3. Jennifer saw him buying lunch from 10am to 12pm at the deli. So 10-12, he's at the deli. 4. Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So 12-2pm, he's heading there. 5. Sarah saw him buying a phone from 2pm to 5pm at the electronics store. So 2-5pm, he's there. 6. Kimberly saw him buying a bike from 6pm to 9pm at the bike shop. 6-9pm, he's there. 7.
